Word-study detail reinforces "לַֽעֲשׂ֖וֹת: thee to keep - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 7 verses. Commentary leans on "The dramatic description 'The LORD talked with you face to face in the mount out of the midst...". Word-study detail reinforces "קְרַ֤ב: Go thou near - to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose".
